title: MHT CET 2026 PCM Answer Key - Overview

detail.title: MHT CET 2026 PCM Answer Key - Overview
detail.short_info: MHT CET PCM Answer Key 2026 for Session 1 has released on May 20, at cetcell.mahacet.org. Check download steps, response sheet, objection fee & last date May 22.

content.text: The Maharashtra State Common Entrance Test Cell has published the MHT CET 2026 PCM provisional answer key and response sheet for Session 1 in the candidate login today. Along with the answer key, the authorities will also provide the question paper and recorded responses so that students can estimate their probable scores even before the result.
Once the answer key is out, students will get a limited objection window (up to May 22 as per current updates) to challenge any question by paying Rs 1000 per question online.

sections.heading: MHT CET 2026 PCM Answer Key - Overview

rows: Maharashtra Common Entrance Test (MHT CET) 2026 – PCM Group
State Common Entrance Test Cell, Maharashtra (CET Cell)
Provisional MHT CET PCM Answer Key 2026
With answer key and question paper in candidate login

sections.heading: Direct Link to MHT CET PCM Answer Key 2026

content.text: The MHT CET PCM Answer Key 2026 for Session 1 will be available only through the candidate login on the official CET Cell portal, cetcell.mahacet.org. Once the link is activated, candidates will be able to log in and download the answer key, response sheet and question paper from the same dashboard.

items: Official portal: cetcell.mahacet.org (State CET Cell, Maharashtra).
MHT CET PCM Answer Key 2026: Click Here

sections.heading: How to Download MHT CET PCM Answer Key 2026 & Response Sheet

content.text: Step-by-Step Process to Download Answer Key
Follow these steps to access your answer key and response sheet:

items: Go to the official website – cetcell.mahacet.org.
Click on the “MHT CET 2026” or “Candidate Login” link for the PCM group.
Log in using your registered email ID / application number and password.
On the dashboard, click on “MHT CET PCM Answer Key 2026 / Response Sheet”.
The provisional answer key, response sheet and question paper will appear on the screen.
Download and save all PDFs for further analysis and objection filing, if required.

rows: All questions asked in your particular shift
Options selected by you for every question
Official correct options as per CET Cell (may change after objections)

content.text: These three documents together allow you to cross-check every question and calculate your expected MHT CET PCM score.

sections.heading: How to Calculate Marks Using MHT CET PCM Answer Key 2026

content.text: Marking Scheme for PCM Group
For the PCM group, the MHT CET 2026 paper pattern and marking scheme are as follows:

items: Mathematics: 50 questions × 2 marks = 100 marks.
Physics: 50 questions × 1 mark = 50 marks.
Chemistry: 50 questions × 1 mark = 50 marks.
Total marks: 200 marks for PCM.
There is no negative marking for wrong or unattempted questions.

content.text: Steps to Estimate Your MHT CET PCM Score

items: Download your response sheet and answer key.
For Mathematics: count total correct answers and multiply by 2.
For Physics: count correct answers and multiply by 1.
For Chemistry: count correct answers and multiply by 1.
Add all three components to get your total out of 200.

content.text: Because there is no negative marking, you do not need to subtract marks for wrong answers; only correct responses add to your score.

sections.heading: MHT CET PCM Answer Key Objection Window 2026

content.text: Last Date and Objection Fee

The CET Cell provides a short objection window to challenge the provisional MHT CET PCM Answer Key 2026. For Session 1 PCM, objections can be filed up to May 22, 2026, as per current updates, and the fee is Rs 1000 per question.
If your challenge is accepted by the expert committee, the answer key is corrected and the objection fee is refunded; otherwise, the fee is not returned.

sections.heading: How to Raise Objections to MHT CET PCM Answer Key

items: Visit cetcell.mahacet.org and open the MHT CET 2026 candidate login.
Enter your login credentials (registered email / application number and password).
Under the “Objection Tracker” section, open the question paper and provisional answer key.
Select the specific question you want to challenge and mark the option you believe is correct.
Upload valid supporting proof, such as scans from standard textbooks or official references.
Pay Rs 1000 per question online and submit the objection form within the deadline.

content.text: Students are advised to raise objections only where they are confident and have strong academic references, as random challenges may not be accepted.

sections.heading: MHT CET PCM Answer Key 2026 - Important Instructions for Candidates

items: Always download the answer key and response sheet only from cetcell.mahacet.org.
Check your name, roll number and other details in the response sheet before using it to compute marks.
For any question you plan to challenge, keep textbook references ready and clearly highlight the relevant explanation.
Avoid waiting till the last minute to raise objections, as payment or server issues near the deadline can cause problems.
Keep all PDFs and receipts safe until the final result and counselling are over.
